title: draba ramulosa
intro: Draba ramulosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the broom crucifer or broom thyme. It is a perennial herb with white or pink flowers, native to the mountainous regions of Western North America. The medicinal properties of Draba ramulosa include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, offering health benefits like reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing.
